bird.summary: The black-throated wren-babbler (Turdinus atrigularis) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is endemic to the island of Born…

relations.evidence: |last3=Eens |first3=Marcel |last4=Costantini |first4=David |date=August 2018 |title=Physiological and immunological responses of birds and mammals to forest degradation: A meta-analysis |journal=Biological Conservation |volume=224 |pages=223–229 |doi=10.1016/j.biocon.2018.06.002 |bibcode=2018BCons.224..223M |issn=0006-3207}} It is threatened by habitat loss
